spider_man.a: Norman Osborn — a scientist who becomes unhinged after taking an experimental formula

spider_man.q: What studio produces Spider-Man films?
spider_man.a: Sony owns the rights, but Marvel Studios co-produced the MCU Spider-Man films with Tom Holland

spider_man.q: What is the Daily Bugle?
spider_man.a: The newspaper where Peter works as a photographer — run by J. Jonah Jameson

who_animal.q: I am the king of the jungle and live in prides.
I am the largest land animal on Earth.
I have black and white stripes and live in Africa.
I am the tallest animal on Earth.
I am the largest mammal in the ocean.
I have a long trunk and large ears, and I live in Asia.
I jump using powerful hind legs and carry my young in a pouch.
I have a black-and-white face and eat bamboo in China.
I am the fastest land animal.
I am a large flightless bird from Africa, the heaviest of all birds.
I am known for changing colors and having a long tongue.
I live in the Arctic and have white fur.
I am known for hopping and saying 'ribbit'.
I am a slow-moving reptile in trees in Asia, often green.
I am known as 'man's best friend.'
I purr and chase mice.
I bray and am similar to a horse but smaller.
I am pink and love mud baths on a farm.
I lay eggs and cluck on a farm.
I am the fastest swimmer in the ocean.
I am a marine mammal known for clapping flippers and balancing balls.
I have a hard shell and walk slowly on land.
I am tiny, fly, and produce honey.
I am a large bird of prey, the national symbol of the United States.
I am a black-and-white aquatic mammal nicknamed the 'killer whale.'
I am a small mammal who carries my young on my back, common in Australia.
I am known for my long ears and love carrots.
I howl at the moon and live in packs.
I am a waterfowl known for my 'quack' sound.
I produce milk on farms and go 'moo.'
I am a woolly farm animal and often counted to fall asleep.
I am a nocturnal bird famous for saying 'hoo.'
I am a graceful white waterbird symbolizing love.
I am a flightless bird that lives on icy continents.

English Arsenal winger, left-footed, explosive, and a star for England
Spanish Barcelona midfielder, teenage playmaker, Golden Boy winner
Spanish midfield genius from Barcelona, won the World Cup and scored in the 2010 final
Spanish defender with a warrior beard, captained Real Madrid and scored huge headers
French striker who won the Ballon d'Or after leading Real Madrid's attack
English forward, Manchester United legend, all-time scorer for club and country for years
Portuguese-born Benfica legend, one of the greatest scorers ever, nicknamed the Black Panther

Brazilian right-back and 2002 World Cup winner, captain of AC Milan and Brazil
Dutch superstar with dreadlocks, Ballon d'Or winner, starred for Milan and Chelsea
Dutch Arsenal legend known for sublime control and elegant finishing
Dutch striker who scored endlessly for Manchester United and Real Madrid
Spanish midfield controller turned elite coach, starred for Liverpool, Real Madrid, and Spain
Dutch winger famous for cutting inside onto his left foot from the right wing
Spanish holding midfielder, Barcelona icon, master of positioning and calmness

English midfielder, teenage superstar who played for Dortmund then Real Madrid

I was a Roman dictator stabbed on the Ides of March.
I painted the Mona Lisa.

I was the 16th U.S. President and ended slavery.

I was a Greek philosopher and student of Plato.
I was an Italian astronomer who supported heliocentrism.
I was the founder of Facebook.
I was the third U.S. President and author of the Declaration of Independence.
I was a Spanish painter known for melting clocks.
I was a Mexican painter known for self-portraits and unibrow.
I founded Microsoft with Paul Allen.
I was a German-born physicist who developed quantum theory.
I was a co-founder of Apple with Steve Wozniak.
I was a Tibetan spiritual leader awarded the Nobel Peace Prize in 1989.
I was an English playwright who wrote Romeo and Juliet.
I was a Greek philosopher who drank hemlock.
I was a Dutch painter who cut off part of my ear.
I was the founder of modern psychoanalysis.
I was a Jewish girl who wrote a famous diary while hiding from Nazis.
I was a deaf and blind American author and activist.
I was the first woman to fly solo across the Atlantic.
I refused to give up my seat on a bus and sparked a civil rights movement.
I was a German philosopher and co-author of 'The Communist Manifesto.'
I was the Mongol warrior-emperor known as the conqueror of Asia.

who_movie_character.q: I run across America, love Jenny, and accidentally drift through history
I am the brightest witch of my age and one of Harry Potter's closest friends
I am the pirate captain with a compass that points to what I want most
Say hello to my little friend. I am the cocaine king of Scarface
You talkin' to me? I am the unstable cab driver from Taxi Driver
I click my ruby slippers and dream of returning to Kansas
I own a chocolate factory and love golden tickets
I fake being sick to skip school in 1980s Chicago
I am the Wall Street killer obsessed with Huey Lewis and business cards
I am the wide-eyed waitress from Paris in Amelie
I am the leather-clad ally of Neo in The Matrix
I am the lion villain with a scar and a murderous plan to take Pride Rock

I'm the space ranger toy who arrives believing I can really fly
I'm the princess-turned-ogre who falls in love with Shrek
I hide as a man to save China in Disney's Mulan
I built the Iron Man suit in a cave, I have an AI named JARVIS, and I said I am Iron Man
I grew up on a moisture farm on Tatooine, discovered the Force, and learned my father was Darth Vader

I'm the lion prince of the Pride Lands, and I return home to reclaim my kingdom
I'm a practically perfect nanny who flies with an umbrella and changes a family's life
I'm a green ogre from a swamp, and I remind everyone that ogres have layers

I'm a robotic AI suit inventor with a goatee and a taste for showmanship
I'm a boy with a lightning bolt scar raised under the Dursleys' stairs

I'm a colorful lawyer with a loud wardrobe and an even louder mouth who works for Albuquerque's criminals
I'm a sardonic FBI agent who sees the supernatural truth nobody else believes
I'm a brilliant but misanthropic doctor who diagnoses impossible cases using a cane

who_what_am_i.q: I have hands but cannot clap. I have a face but no eyes. What am I?
I am tall when young and short when old. You burn me to light the dark. What am I?
I have keys but no locks. I have space but no room. You can enter but not go inside. What am I?
The more you take, the more you leave behind. What am I?
I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body but I come alive with wind. What am I?
What has four legs but doesn't walk?
What must be broken before you can use it?
The more I dry, the wetter I get. What am I?
What goes up but never comes down?
I have cities but no houses. I have mountains but no trees. I have water but no fish. What am I?
I have an eye but cannot see. I am small and pointy. What am I?
I follow you all day but disappear when night falls. What am I?
I have a head and a tail but no body. What am I?
I have a neck but no head. I may be filled with drink. What am I?
I have many teeth but cannot bite. I help neaten your hair. What am I?
I can travel around the world while staying in a corner. What am I?
I run but never walk. I have a bed but never sleep. What am I?
I have a thumb and four fingers but I am not alive. What am I?
I am full of holes but still hold water. What am I?
I have roots no one sees. I am taller than trees. Up up I go and yet never grow. What am I?
I am always in front of you but can never be seen. What am I?
I have branches but no fruit, trunk, or leaves. You visit me to hold your money. What am I?
The more you have of me, the less you see. What am I?
I have one head, one foot, and four legs. Each night you sleep on me. What am I?
I am so fragile that saying my name breaks me. What am I?
Until I am measured, I am not known, yet you miss me when I have flown. What am I?
I have teeth but cannot eat. I keep clothes closed. What am I?
I can fly without wings and cry without eyes. I drift across the sky. What am I?
I have 13 hearts but no organs. I am shuffled and dealt. What am I?
I grow short the more I am used. I have wood but am not a tree. What am I?
